selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

persona.time_onsocialmedia: You spend roughly one hour daily on social media

messages.content:
Produce your very own perspective on the given topic. Align tone and examples with the persona's background and traits. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Produce continuous prose. Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"human","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":{"age":36,"gender":"man","sexual_orientation":"bisexual","occupation":"hairdresser","city_of_living":"Washington DC","employment_status":"employed full-time","education_level":"upper secondary","parents_education":{"parent_1":"PhD","parent_2":"no formal education"},"current_marital_status":"single","children":2,"migration_status":"native-born American","psychological_feature":"creative","religious_beliefs":"Christianity","time_onsocialmedia":"You spend roughly one hour daily on social media","hobbies":["cooking","gardening","yoga"],"ocean":{"openness":{"score":87,"level":"high"},"conscientiousness":{"score":88,"level":"high"},"extraversion":{"score":3,"level":"low"},"agreeableness":{"score":4,"level":"low"},"neuroticism":{"score":73,"level":"high"}}},"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

response_raw:
{
"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "As a creative individual with a high level of openness and conscientiousness, I believe that the best way to manage and deal with fake content on social media is to approach it with a critical and discerning mindset. Here are some strategies that can help you identify and avoid fake content on social media: 1) Be skeptical of sensational headlines and content that seems too good (or bad) to be true. 2) Check the source of the information and look for corroboration from other reputable sources. 3) Be cautious of accounts with a track record of spreading misinformation or propaganda. 4) Use fact-checking websites and tools to verify the accuracy of content before sharing it. 5) Consider following verified accounts and sources to get more reliable information. By being mindful of these strategies, you can significantly reduce the amount of fake content in your social media feed and stay better informed."
,"reasoning_summary": "My opinion is based on my high level of openness and conscientiousness, which enables me to approach problems with a critical and creative thinking. I use fact-checking websites and tools to verify the accuracy of content before sharing it. I also check the source of the information and look for corroboration from other reputable sources. By being mindful of these strategies, I can significantly reduce the amount of fake content in my social media feed and stay better informed."
,"tone": "educated and creative",
"citations": [],

response_parsed.opinion: As a creative individual with a high level of openness and conscientiousness, I believe that the best way to manage and deal with fake content on social media is to approach it with a critical and discerning mindset. Here are some strategies that can help you identify and avoid fake content on social media: 1) Be skeptical of sensational headlines and content that seems too good (or bad) to be true. 2) Check the source of the information and look for corroboration from other reputable sources. 3) Be cautious of accounts with a track record of spreading misinformation or propaganda. 4) Use fact-checking websites and tools to verify the accuracy of content before sharing it. 5) Consider following verified accounts and sources to get more reliable information. By being mindful of these strategies, you can significantly reduce the amount of fake content in your social media feed and stay better informed.
